title: Copper Expansion - Pale Garden Adds
description: Copper weapons, armors, and enchanments with lightninght thematic. And Pale Garden variants and structures
body:
(NEEDS OPTIFIME OR CEM MODS LIKE [ETF] Entity Texture Features to mobs textures works)

![Copper Expansion banner](https://i.imgur.com/fNxhJbo.png)
![Armor attributes](https://i.imgur.com/Uv8PDnV.png)
![Structures](https://i.imgur.com/0Eszwfs.png)
# Copper Expansion Datapack

This datapack add a lot of usefull things to copper like: decorative panels, enchanments, a new sweapon, 2 news armor sets and more:

**Full list of features:**

- 2 new lightningh enchanments in structures, lighningh blade and volt protection.
- 2 news structures, one in the overworld and other in the nether.
- 2 new armor sets, copper armor, and copperite armor.
- 9 decorative animated panels for decoration.
- 3 news decorative panels made with copper.

**How to get items:**

With 3 advancements, you just have to give yourself: copper ingot, copper bulb, and copper grate, and you will have al the recipes.
